title: Let the current primary-repo-flat packet reappear once the short hold clears
summary: Patched the distribution lane selector so the prepared-only repeat guard stops blocking the already-current primary-repo-flat publisher packet after the documented short-window release time passes, preventing another fake-empty post-hold repair loop.
evidence: distribution_lane_latest.md says the current board is truthfully empty until 2026-05-26T20:55:18.
marketing_execution_board_latest.md says a refreshed primary-repo-flat publisher packet already exists but is post-hold only until 2026-05-26T20:55:18.
The repeat guard could still suppress that same current packet after release just because it had been prepared twice during the hold.
